race.comment: WONDERFUL SKY (12) is a filly by Ole Kirk on debut for the Walker yard. She won her recent jumpout at Cranbourne and Lane booked is a good lead. Keep safe. CHAPADOS (13) debuted in a hot race at Flemington in G3 company behind Medicinal. That looks one of the better 2yo formlines in the country and this should prove much easier. OXLEY TYCOON (4) is a Written tycoon colt on debut for Moody & Coleman. Has jumped out well in readiness and keeps Nolan. Can make a bright start. SOUND SYSTEM (7) resumes and can be an improver.
